action.reasoning: Observation: mae_60min worsened to 3.9787 (val MAE~3.07) from 3.9235 after adding buggy temporal Conv1d (applied over spatial dim N=207 instead of time). Previous residual spatial GCN (hidden=512, 8 layers) was stronger; loss/MAE still slowly improving at end of 50 epochs. Analysis: Revert model to clean residual spatial GCN (no tconv misapplication), set num_gcn_layers=8, dropout=0.05, epochs=40 (fits remaining ~35min budget at ~40s/epoch), AdamW wd=5e-5 for better regularization. Predict.py and norm logic are solid. Decision: Edit model.py + train.py params, train, then submit_eval to recover+improve best mae_60min.
